state.title: SET status = 'succeeded'

parts.text:
No blocking issues found.

I verified the cancel-requested + provider-succeeded reconciliation success updates in `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts`, and each relevant `UPDATE workspace_deployments ... SET status = 'succeeded'` path now sets `duration_ms`:

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1350`
- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1721`
- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:2259`

So the missing `duration_ms` issue in that reconciliation flow appears fixed.
